title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ DOГғВ‘A AURORA ANNEX IN BARANGAY AURORA HILL, CITY OF BAGUIO FROM THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS DOГғВ‘A AURORA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6585; 109 OG No. 28, 4861 (July 15, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10476, April 16, 2013 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ DOГғВ‘A AURORA ANNEX IN BARANGAY AURORA HILL, CITY OF BAGUIO FROM THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS DOГғВ‘A AURORA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВҖВ“ The Baguio City National High School ГўВҖВ“ DoГұa Aurora Annex in

Barangay Aurora Hill, City of Baguio is hereby separated from the Baguio

City National High School and converted into an independent national

high school to be known as DoГұa Aurora National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВҖВ“

All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Baguio City

National High School ГўВҖВ“ DoГұa Aurora Annex are hereby transferred to and

absorbed by the DoГұa Aurora National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education

shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВҖВҷs program the

operationalization of the DoГұa Aurora National High School the initial

funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВҖВҷs

appropriations of the Baguio City National High School ГўВҖВ“ DoГұa Aurora

Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of

the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education

shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out

the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October

15, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 16 2013

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
